FLYX.VISUALS Thumbnail Designer
About

THE DESIGNER
BEHIND THE
CLICKS

I'm a freelance YouTube Thumbnail Designer obsessed with one thing: making viewers click. With years of studying what makes thumbnails convert and thousands of designs delivered, I've cracked the formula for maximum click-through rate.

Every thumbnail I design is the product of deep research into your niche, your competitors, and your audience psychology. It's not just art — it's strategic visual communication built to grab attention within 0.3 seconds.

Adobe Photoshop CTR Optimization Color Theory Typography Facial Expression Niche Research A/B Testing Brand Identity
"A great thumbnail isn't decoration — it's the most important marketing asset in a creator's arsenal. I design each one like a billboard that has 0.3 seconds to convert a stranger into a viewer."
✦ Work With Me 📸 @flyx.visuals
FAQ

COMMON
QUESTIONS

Most thumbnails are delivered within 48 hours of receiving all the required assets. Rush delivery within 24 hours is available for an additional fee. Complex designs or batch orders may take slightly longer — I'll always confirm a timeline upfront.
Pricing depends on complexity and volume. A single thumbnail starts at $15, with bundle packages for 5+ thumbnails offering significant savings. Use the order form to describe your project and I'll send a custom quote within a few hours. Quality-first pricing means you get agency-level design without agency-level cost.
Unlimited revisions. I iterate until you're 100% satisfied with the result. Revisions are free as long as they're within the original scope. Major concept changes after approval may incur a small additional fee, but this rarely happens because I take detailed briefs upfront.
Fill out the order form with your channel niche, video topic, your photo (if using a face-forward thumbnail), any inspiration references, preferred color scheme, and any text you want included. The more detail you provide, the better the first draft. I'll also research your niche and competitors before starting.
Yes — monthly retainer packages are available for creators who upload weekly or more. These packages offer priority turnaround, discounted rates, and a consistent visual identity maintained across all your thumbnails. Contact me to discuss a custom package.
Every thumbnail I design is engineered specifically for CTR — using proven principles of color contrast, emotional triggers, facial expressions, and typography hierarchy. While I can't guarantee specific numbers (YouTube's algorithm plays a role too), my clients consistently see CTR improvements averaging 200–400% compared to their previous thumbnails.
All thumbnails are delivered as high-resolution JPG files at 1920×1080px, 72 DPI — optimized and ready to upload directly to YouTube. PSD source files are available on request for an additional fee. Deliverables are shared via Google Drive or WeTransfer.
